titleStmt.title: SII 24.362: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 362. (A.R. No. 257 of 1930.) II PRĀKĀRA, SĒṈAIMUDALIYĀR SHRINE, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of 7 vēli of land in the village Maṇakkuḍi Sendāmaraikkaṇṇanallūr alias Gāṅgaiyanpēṭṭai by Liṅgayan son of Patsala Nāgu-śeṭṭi of Punāgasila-gōtra, a Traivarṇika of Peruṅgoṇḍai-rājya for the daily and special offerings to god Raṅganātha. States that the donee originally obtained the village from Immaḍi Vīraṇa-Daṇṇāyaka for the deity and that it was situated in Kīḻpalāṟu in Uṟaiyūr-kūṟṟam, a sub-division of Teṉkarai-Rājagaṁbhīravaḷanāḍu. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1433, Prajāpati, Siṁha, ba. dvādaśi, Wednesday, Pushya, correspond to A.D. 1511, August 20, Wednesday, ·27; ·55.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran Ariyarāyavipāṭaṉ bhāṣaikkut tappuvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ muvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇ
ṭanāṭu koṭātāṉ pūrvvadakṣiṇapaścimottara catussamudrādhipati śrīman rājādhirājan rājaparameśvaran śrī virapratāpa
śrīkṛṣṇadevamahārāyar pṛthivīrājayam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 3 10 3- ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa prajāpati samvatsara
ttu simhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu dvādaśiyum budha vāramum variyānyogamum peṟṟa puṣyanakṣatrattu nāḷ perumāḷ śrī raṅganāthadevaṟku peru
ṅkoṇṭai rājyattil traivarṇikaril punāgasilagotrattu patsala nāku ceṭṭiputran liṅgayan kuṭutta dharmmaśāsanap paṭṭayam tiruccilāppaḷḷi U
cāvaṭi teṉkarai rājagambhīravaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūṟ kūṟṟattuk kiḻpalāṟṟu muṉṉāḷ nām Immaṭi viraṇa daṇṇāyakka Uṭaiyar kaiyile śrīraṅganāthadevaṟku
Eṉṟu keṭṭu vāṅkiṉa viḷattūṟ paṟṟu maṇakkuṭi centāmaraik kaṇṇa nallūr Āṉa kāṅkaiyaṉ peṭṭai Ūr Oṉṟukku nāṉkellaikku U
ṭpaṭṭa nañcey rūpāy rūpāy-li� puṉcey rūpāy- 2 li Āka nilam 7 li Inta nilam Ēḻu veliyum Eṉṉuṭaiya Ubhayam Āka nāḷ toṟum Iraṇṭu taḷikai daddhyodanam Āka pe
rumāḷ Amutuceytaruḷavum Inta Ūrile varuṣattukku Orunāḷ taittirunāḷ Iraṇṭāntirunāḷ tiruttoppile Ēṟi Aruḷi ciṟappu Āka muppatu taḷikai A
mutu ceytaruḷavum kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇikkuṭutta Inta Ūṟku nāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nañcey puñcey nattam ceytalai tiṭar maṟṟum Uṇṭāṉa sakala
samudāyaprāptikaḷum Inta Ūril kuṭi Uḷḷatum sarvvamānyam Āka Ācandrārkka sthāyi Āka perumāḷ śrī raṅganāthadevar Aṉubhavittukkoḷḷum paṭikku
nāṉkellaikkum tiruvāḻikkallu nāṭṭi kuṭuttapaṭi Āle Ituve dharmmaśāsanam Āka naṭakkakkaṭavatu Ākavum Inta kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇina viṅkicceṭṭiyār rāmā
ṉujakūṭattukku nāḷatu nāḷ Oṉṟukku perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar Amutu ceytaruḷiṉa taḷikai Iraṇṭilum tiruttoppil varuṣattukku Orunāḷ Amutu ceytaruḷiṉa taḷikai
muppatile viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu nālil Oṉṟum cantrādityavaraiyum tayyamaṟRead ‘tappāmal’ naṭakkakkaṭavatu Ākavum . dānapālanayormmaddhye dānāt śreyonupālanam . dānaāt svarggamavaāpnoti pālanādacyutam padam .
svadattām paradattām vā yo hareta vasundharām . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāñjāyate kṛmiḥ . svadattāt dviguṇam puṇyam paradattānupālanam . paradattāpahāreṇa svadattam
niṣphalam bhavet . Ekaiva bhagini loke sarvveṣāmeva bhūbhujām . na bhojyā na karagrāhyā viṣṇudattā vasundharā§
Digital edition of SII 24.362 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
